title: ICE CEO Says Hyperliquid 'Bigger Than NASDAQ' — Reveals He Met Its Founders
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) CEO Jeffrey Sprecher said Hyperliquid, a crypto-native trading platform, is 'bigger than NASDAQ' and revealed he has met its founders. This signals deepening engagement between traditional finance and decentralized trading infrastructure.
body:
Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) CEO Jeffrey Sprecher publicly praised Hyperliquid, a decentralized trading platform, stating it is "bigger than NASDAQ" in a significant endorsement. Sprecher also revealed that he has met Hyperliquid's founders, signaling deeper engagement between Wall Street incumbents and crypto-native rails.

Sprecher's comments highlight the growing interest from traditional financial giants in decentralized infrastructure. Hyperliquid, known for its decentralized perpetual contracts platform, has been gaining traction among crypto traders for its innovative approach to derivatives.

This endorsement is a major validation for the crypto industry, showing that established financial leaders are taking decentralized platforms seriously. For everyday users, this could mean more mainstream adoption of crypto trading tools and potential integration with traditional financial services.

What to watch: Keep an eye on further interactions between ICE and Hyperliquid, as well as any new products or partnerships that may emerge. This could mark a turning point for crypto's integration into traditional finance.

Hyperliquid is a decentralized trading platform for perpetual contracts. Sprecher's endorsement shows Wall Street is taking crypto-native infrastructure seriously.
